height="60" width="440" x="510" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1VDlkc1AhJWiyI_MuTh-24" parent="3" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=24;" value="$$
V = \begin{vmatrix}
a_1 & b_1 & c_1 \\
a_2 & b_2 & c_2 \\
a_3 & b_3 & c_3
\end{vmatrix}$$" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="230" x="730" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A5dG-Nk4mqRnNPnYTPpJ-5" parent="3" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=default;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=24;" value="$$
ax^2 \,+bx\,+\,c \,=\, 0
\\ \\
x\,=\,\frac{-b±\sqrt{b^2-4ac}}{2a}
$$" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="310" x="630" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A5dG-Nk4mqRnNPnYTPpJ-8" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="239.76" width="100" x="120" y="244" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1VDlkc1AhJWiyI_MuTh-19" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="\( (0,0,0) \)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="574" y="357" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1VDlkc1AhJWiyI_MuTh-20" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="\( (a_1,b_1,c_1) \)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="688" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1VDlkc1AhJWiyI_MuTh-21" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="\( (a_2,b_2,c_2) \)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="608" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1VDlkc1AhJWiyI_MuTh-22" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="\( (a_3,b_3,c_3) \)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="708" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1VDlkc1AhJWiyI_MuTh-25" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=24;" value="$$
